parameters.query:
WITH ext AS (
  UPDATE appdata.extractions
  SET accepted_by = $2::bigint, accepted_at = now()
  WHERE id = $1::bigint AND accepted_at IS NULL
  RETURNING id, transcript_id, payload
), tr AS (
  SELECT dc.opportunity_id
  FROM appdata.transcripts t
  JOIN appdata.discovery_calls dc ON dc.id = t.discovery_call_id
  WHERE t.id = (SELECT transcript_id FROM ext)
), opp AS (
  SELECT o.id AS opportunity_id, o.client_id, c.type AS client_type, c.organization_id
  FROM appdata.opportunities o
  JOIN appdata.clients c ON c.id = o.client_id
  WHERE o.id = (SELECT opportunity_id FROM tr)
), org_update AS (
  UPDATE appdata.organizations
  SET business_context = (SELECT payload -> 'business_context' FROM ext)
  WHERE id = (SELECT organization_id FROM opp)
  RETURNING id
), participant AS (
  INSERT INTO appdata.participants (client_id, communication_situations)
  SELECT (SELECT client_id FROM opp),
         ARRAY(SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text(coalesce((SELECT payload -> 'communication_situations' FROM ext), '[]'::jsonb)))
  RETURNING id
), auditor AS (
  SELECT id FROM appdata.users
  WHERE role = 'auditor' AND active
    AND email = CASE WHEN (SELECT client_type FROM opp) = 'B2B' THEN 'd.michalska@coaction.pl' ELSE 'a.kubiak@coaction.pl' END
), audit AS (
  INSERT INTO appdata.audits (participant_id, opportunity_id, auditor_user_id, status)
  VALUES ((SELECT id FROM participant), (SELECT opportunity_id FROM opp), (SELECT id FROM auditor), 'planned')
  RETURNING id
), task AS (
  INSERT INTO appdata.tasks (entity_type, entity_id, assignee_user_id, title, stage_ref)
  VALUES ('audit', (SELECT id FROM audit), (SELECT id FROM auditor), 'Przeprowadź audyt — opportunity #' || (SELECT opportunity_id FROM opp), 'badanie_potrzeb')
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT
  (SELECT id FROM participant) AS participant_id,
  (SELECT id FROM audit)       AS audit_id,
  (SELECT id FROM task)        AS task_id;

nodes.name: Postgres: Zatwierdź ekstrakcję i zaplanuj audyt
